title: Batch Contamination
description: Scale inhibitor delivery (Batch-12B) was found to have trace levels of cross-contamination from a previous drilling fluid production run.
root_cause: Inadequate cleaning of transport tank at vendor facility
vendor_actions_taken: Immediate uplift of contaminated batch, free replacement within 72 hours, updated tank cleaning QA protocols
business_impact: Medium - 48h production delay for the Affected Wells
follow_up_actions: Mandatory independent QA check on first 3 lots of next supply
Daleel to perform vendor facility audit in Q3
